resolved_items.action: Client teams: Publish ordered headliner preferences (including no-headliner option)
resolved_items.resolution: Client preferences were presented in ACDE #231: Erigon liked Lucid or Frame, Besu preferred Lucid, Geth preferred Frame, Nethermind not convinced by complexity, Reth found Frame over-engineered, Nimbus preferred SSZ with Frame.

resolved_items.action: Frame transactions champions: develop prototype mempool rules, clarify 8141 txpool spec for 2-week review
resolved_items.resolution: Frame tx mempool doc was published showing 3 strategies with Strategy 2 recommended. EIP-8141 was CFI'd for Hegotá as non-headliner, indicating the spec work was completed.
